checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View is only allowed when projectStatus is Active, principal is in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator role, and the relevant role constraints are met

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit is only allowed when projectStatus is Active, principal is in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator role, and the relevant role constraints are met

checks.name: cross_department_block_view
checks.description: View is forbidden when user department does not match document projectManagingDepartment (unless GlobalAuditor). The ceiling must enforce department match or GlobalAuditor membership.

checks.name: cross_department_block_edit
checks.description: Edit is forbidden when user department does not match document projectManagingDepartment (unless GlobalAuditor). The ceiling must enforce department match or GlobalAuditor membership.

checks.name: clinical_researcher_view_floor
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel >= 3, same department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View

checks.name: clinical_researcher_edit_floor
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel >= 3, same department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: pi_view_floor
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with networkRiskScore < 20, compliant device, same department, active project MUST be able to View

checks.name: pi_edit_floor
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with networkRiskScore < 20, compliant device, same department, active project MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: auditor_cross_dept_view_floor
checks.description: A GlobalAuditor who is also a ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel >= 3, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View even across departments

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all

results.description: View is only allowed when projectStatus is Active, principal is in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator role, and the relevant role constraints are met
Edit is only allowed when projectStatus is Active, principal is in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator role, and the relevant role constraints are met
View is forbidden when user department does not match document projectManagingDepartment (unless GlobalAuditor). The ceiling must enforce department match or GlobalAuditor membership.
Edit is forbidden when user department does not match document projectManagingDepartment (unless GlobalAuditor). The ceiling must enforce department match or GlobalAuditor membership.
A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel >= 3, same department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View
A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel >= 3, same department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to Edit
A PrincipalInvestigator with networkRiskScore < 20, compliant device, same department, active project MUST be able to View
A PrincipalInvestigator with networkRiskScore < 20, compliant device, same department, active project MUST be able to Edit
A GlobalAuditor who is also a ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel >= 3, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View even across departments
View policy is not trivially deny-all
Edit policy is not trivially deny-all
